name: Applesauce Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cream margarine until fluffy.
3. Beat eggs and sugar; add to margarine, blending well.
4. Sift together dry ingredients. Add to margarine mixture alternately with applesauce, mixing after each addition.
5. Stir in vanilla and nuts.
6. Spoon batter into a 12-cupcake pan sprayed with vegetable cooking spray or lined with paper baking cups.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes.
Note:
Calories per cupcake - 177
Starch/bread exchange - 1 1/2
Fat - 2.7 gm
Protein - 1 1/2 gm
Carbohydrate - 19.8 gm
Sodium - 207.6 mg
Potassium - 53.3 mg
Fiber - 1 gm
Cholesterol - 23 mg
Source: American Diabetes Association, Family Cookbook, Volume 1, 1987. Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, November 1993.
